title: Oak & Steel - 12 Mini Clip Top Glass Spice Storage Jars - 100 ml Glass Canister Containers with Lids, 24 Labels and Chalk Pen (8 x 5cm) - Perfect for Spice Storage, Jam, Honey, Gifting
features: Stay Organised - Our small glass jars with lids are perfect for ‘store & display’ on the kitchen spice rack, adding charm and quirkiness with our customisable black labels and chalk pen provided.
Mini Clip Top Glass Jars: Organize your spices with style using our clear glass jars, each equipped with a secure clip top lid to preserve freshness and flavor.
Ideal Size: The 100ml capacity of each jar is perfect for storing a variety of spices, herbs, or seasonings, keeping your kitchen organized and your ingredients easily accessible.
Airtight Seal: The clip top lids provide a tight seal, keeping your spices and herbs fresh for longer periods and ensuring that flavors remain intact.

High-Quality - Made from high-quality glass and with a sturdy clip-top lid, our glass jars for spices are designed to last. They're perfect for use in the kitchen or for various DIY projects, making them a versatile and durable addition to your home.
description: Product Description Dry spices & herbs Store your story of dry seasonings in sleek glass jars, preserving flavour and style with every savoury sprinkle. Wet spices & rubs Capture the rich essence of wet spices within glass storage jars, preserving their bold flavours and enticing aromas for culinary delights. Jams, preserves and conserves Preserve jams, marmalades, and preserves in glass jars, capturing the essence of ripe fruits for delightful spreads., makes the perfect gift too! Sweets & Sprinkles Display your sprinkles and sweets in our glass jars, transforming them into a delightful colourful confections that spark joy with every glance. Making little moments Wedding Favours Elevate your wedding favours with our elegant glass jars, offering guests a stylish keepsake filled with sweet memories to cherish long after the celebration ends. Fill our versatile jars with an array of delightful treats such as homemade jams, candies, nuts, or even small handmade trinkets, allowing you to customise each favour to suit your unique wedding style and preferences.
